vocab.meaning: một thói quen hiển nhiên, đương nhiên
vocab.example: I carry a pocket-sized umbrella as a matter of course, given the unpredictable nature of the weather here.

vocab.meaning: làm chật cứng/lộn xộn túi quần
vocab.example: I loathe having too many gadgets that clutter my pockets, so I try to keep my belongings to an absolute minimum.
A high-quality leather tote is a versatile accessory that accommodates both my laptop and personal effects seamlessly.

vocab.meaning: bộ đồ dùng thiết yếu nơi đô thị
vocab.example: My backpack essentially serves as an urban survival kit, containing everything from a portable charger to a small first-aid kit.

vocab.meaning: vật gây cản trở, sự cồng kềnh
vocab.example: I find carrying a large wallet to be a bit of an encumbrance, so I’ve switched to a minimalist cardholder.

vocab.meaning: được để lại, vật gia truyền
vocab.example: I always carry an old fountain pen that was bequeathed to me by my grandfather; it's a cherished keepsake.

vocab.meaning: những món đồ mang tính thực dụng
vocab.example: My bag is mostly filled with utilitarian items like a multi-tool and a reusable water flask.

vocab.meaning: để trong tầm tay, luôn mang sát bên mình
vocab.example: My asthma inhaler is the one thing I must keep within reach at all times whenever I venture outdoors.

vocab.meaning: không thể thỏa hiệp (món đồ bắt buộc phải mang)
vocab.example: Noise-canceling headphones are a non-negotiable for me when navigating the cacophony of the city center.

vocab.meaning: một đống đồ đạc to lớn, cồng kềnh
vocab.example: I managed to replace my bulky stash of physical loyalty cards with a single integrated app on my phone.
